<p>Behind every LounGenie deployment is a leadership team with deep expertise in hospitality operations, corporate finance, and global brand marketing. This team has guided Pool Safe Inc. from early-stage development to partnerships with some of the world's most recognized hotel, resort, and waterpark brands.</p>

<p style="margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0">Mr. David Berger is Executive Chairman and CEO, Pool Safe Inc. <p style="margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0">Mr. Steven Glaser is Chief Operating Officer, Chief Financial Officer and Director, Pool Safe Inc. Mr. Glaser is a financial service executive with a diverse background in corporate finance, communications and governance for private and public companies. He spent the last eight years working in the corporate finance and investment banking arena focused on assisting late stage private and early stage public companies with strategic planning and capital raising. Prior to that, Mr. Glaser spent seven years as Vice President Corporate Affairs of Azure Dynamics Corporation, responsible for the company's corporate governance, its domestic and international stock exchange listings, and the build-out of the company's Investor Relations division. Mr. Glaser holds a Bachelor of Administrative Studies degree as well as an M.B.A. in finance.</p>

Since January 1997 he has been a self-employed financial consultant, serving private individuals and companies in a variety of industries, including mining, oil and gas, real estate and investment strategies. title.rendered: About LounGenie | Hospitality Technology for Premium Seating

content.rendered:
About

Why hospitality operators choose LounGenie

LounGenie is built for resort and waterpark decision makers who need to improve guest satisfaction while tightening service execution in premium seating areas.

Book a Property Demo
Review Features

Mission

Make premium seating work harder.

title.rendered: LounGenie Features | QR Ordering, Safe, Charging and Guest Amenities

content.rendered:
Platform Features

Choose the right rollout for your premium seating operation

LounGenie is structured in cumulative tiers so operators can start with the right guest experience and add service workflow or QR ordering when the property is ready.

Book a Property Demo
View Installation Gallery

Decision Criteria

Start with the operating outcome you need to improve first.

Guest comfort

If the goal is better seat value, guest satisfaction, and longer stays, start with the essentials built into Classic.

Service workflow

If the main issue is guest requests and staff response flow, Service+ adds the call button and alert path to the staff touchscreen monitor.

F&B conversion

If the priority is shortening the path from intent to order, 2.0 adds QR ordering while keeping the full Service+ workflow in place.

Configurations

Choose the rollout tier that fits your operation.

Classic

The premium-seat essentials

Waterproof safe, solar USB charging, and a removable ice bucket for the premium seating foundation.

Waterproof safeSolar USB chargingRemovable ice bucket

Service+

Classic plus a staff-service workflow

Adds a general service call button so the guest can request help and staff can see exactly which premium seat needs attention.

Everything in ClassicService call buttonStaff touchscreen alerts

2.0

Service+ plus QR ordering

Adds QR ordering to the Service+ model so food-and-beverage intent can move faster while the service call workflow stays active.

Everything in Service+QR orderingDedicated printer workflow

Operational Flow

Reduce friction for guests and staff.

Service alerts route to the staff touchscreen monitor while QR orders print to a dedicated PoolSafe printer. Those are separate paths, which keeps the operational workflow clear.

Designed for operators

  • Guest requests stay visible to staff without guesswork
  • Ordering stays close to the seat in 2.0
  • Each tier adds capability without replacing the previous one

Where Each Tier Fits

Match the rollout to the seating zone, service model, and guest expectation.

Classic

A fit for premium seating areas that need a stronger guest experience first, before adding service workflow or ordering.

Service+

A fit for operations that want fewer missed requests and clearer service visibility across cabanas or daybeds.

2.0

A fit for properties ready to capture more seat-side ordering activity without removing the underlying service call workflow.
